---
name: Security Vulnerability
about: Privately report a security issue
title: '[security] '
labels: ['security']
assignees: []
---

> **Do NOT disclose a public issue.** Instead, use GitHub Security Advisories:
> https://github.com/sudoeren/arhus/security/advisories/new
>
> Or email the maintainer directly. This template is only for non-sensitive
> security-related improvements (e.g. missing rule, false negative).

**Describe the vulnerability pattern**
What should arhus detect that it currently misses?

**Example**
Provide a code snippet that demonstrates the vulnerability.

**Proposed rule**
If you have an idea for how to detect it, describe it here.
